expected_findings.description: Hook defined outside @green-goods/shared. All hooks MUST live in packages/shared/src/hooks/. This file creates a new hook in packages/client/src/hooks/ which violates the Hook Boundary rule (CLAUDE.md Key Principle #4, shared.md Hook Architecture). The filtering logic should be a pure function or moved to packages/shared/src/hooks/garden/.

expected_findings.line_context: onError: (error) => { console.error("Failed to update garden domain:", error);
expected_findings.description: Mutation hook catches error but uses console.error instead of parseContractError() + createMutationErrorHandler(). This violates the Error Handling rule (CLAUDE.md Key Patterns, TypeScript Rule #4). Should use createMutationErrorHandler() like useWorkApproval and other mutation hooks in the codebase. Also violates Rule #12 (console.log cleanup) by using console.error instead of logger.
Deep import path bypassing barrel export. Should be: import { useAuth } from "@green-goods/shared". This violates Rule #11 (Barrel Import Enforcement) and the Barrel Imports key pattern in CLAUDE.md.
